$comment: Authoritative exclude list for the team-learners-site viewer. The site at team-learners.vercel.app mirrors this repo file-by-file, but should skip anything in `exclude` — these paths are plumbing or humans-only notes, not part of the company's public surface. The viewer repo (learners-superpumped/team-learners-site) must read this file at build time and respect it.
